Like they're much more able to manipulate political environments better than Arab leaders because the Arabs were just not good at politics. Maybe because they hadn't practiced it because they were all part of the Ottoman Empire and the Turks handle everything or whatever. But Israel is very good at at political stuff and organization and military stuff and everything. They had all these western lessons they took with them.
